feed.noResultsHint: Try searching a city manually or move to another area.

card.defaultDescription: A fascinating historic site waiting to be discovered.

profile.title: Profile
profile.chronicleSub: Did you find an unmapped fortress or ruin? Tap here to scan and add it to the map.
profile.deleteMessage: Are you sure? This action is permanent. You will lose all your favorites and contributions.
profile.deleteError: Could not delete account. Please try again later.
profile.guestSub: Sign in to track your conquests and build your profile.

discoveries.title: My Discoveries
discoveries.emptyPlacesSub: Add a historic site from the "Add Place" tab and it will appear here.
discoveries.emptyContribSub: Upload a photo or description for any place to contribute to the community.

favorites.title: My Favorites
favorites.emptySub: Tap the heart on any place to save it here.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your journey

footer.tagline: Discovering the past, one place at a time.
footer.gdprText1: We collect your GPS location to show nearby historic sites, and your account info (name and email via Google Sign-In). Any photos or descriptions you submit are stored linked to your account.
footer.gdprText2: Under the EU General Data Protection Regulation you have the right to
footer.gdprText3: your personal data at any time. To exercise these rights contact:
footer.gdprText4: You may also lodge a complaint with your national data protection authority (e.g. CNIL, BfDI, AEPD, Garante).
